task: Write a React component for a responsive navbar with a logo, 4 nav links, and a CTA button. Use Tailwind CSS. Include mobile hamburger menu.
Write a React card component for displaying a team member profile. Include name, role, bio, and avatar. Use Tailwind CSS with glassmorphism effect.
Write a pricing section with 3 tiers (Free, Pro, Enterprise) using a bento grid layout. Each tier should have a feature list, price, and CTA button. Use Tailwind CSS and React.
Write a React form component for a contact page with name, email, message fields and a submit button. Include loading, error, and success states.
Write a React component that fades in and slides up when it enters the viewport. Use Framer Motion's whileInView.
key_rules: use Framer Motion not GSAP for UI enter

task: Write a React feature grid component where 6 items stagger in sequentially when the section enters the viewport. Use Framer Motion.
Write a horizontal scroll section using GSAP ScrollTrigger. The section should pin and scroll horizontally as the user scrolls vertically. Include 4 content panels.
key_rules: GSAP for scroll pinning not Framer

task: Write a magnetic button component in React that follows the cursor when hovered. The button should smoothly attract toward the mouse position.
Write a React hero section for a project management SaaS product. Include a compelling headline, subheadline, CTA button, and trust badges. The copy should follow the AIDA framework.
Write a features section for an AI writing tool. Include 4 feature blocks, each with an icon area, headline, and description. Copy should use the FAB framework (Features, Advantages, Benefits).
Write a CTA section with objection handling for a premium design course. Include headline, 3 objection-busting bullet points, price, and two CTAs (primary and secondary).
Write a testimonial carousel section in React. Include 3 testimonials with avatar, name, role, company, and quote. Use Framer Motion for slide transitions. Write real testimonial copy.

Write a split-screen hero section for a fitness app. Left side: compelling copy with AIDA framework, CTA button with magnetic hover effect. Right side: a parallax tilt card showing app screenshot placeholder using a colored div. Include scroll reveal animation.

Write a complete landing page footer with 4 columns: product links, resources links, company links, and a newsletter signup form. Include animated hover states on links and a subtle gradient border on the newsletter input.

Write a dashboard stats overview component with 4 stat cards in a bento grid. Each card shows a metric name, value, trend arrow, and a mini sparkline chart (use a simple SVG path). Include stagger animation on mount.
Write a React component with infinite floating particles as a decorative background. The particles should be GPU-accelerated and respect prefers-reduced-motion. Include proper cleanup.
Write a React component for an asymmetric hero section with a large headline on the left (60% width) and a stacked card layout on the right (40% width). Use CSS Grid, not flexbox percentage math.

Write a scroll-linked text reveal component in React. As the user scrolls, each word in a paragraph should progressively change from gray to black. Use CSS animation-timeline: scroll() for zero-JS cost.

Write a product showcase section with a large product image area (colored placeholder div), feature highlights using a stagger grid, and a CTA with AIDA copy. Include GSAP scroll-triggered reveal for the image and Framer Motion stagger for the feature grid.
key_rules: never mix GSAP+Framer in same component

task: Write a full above-the-fold landing page section for a cloud storage service. Include: sticky navbar, asymmetric hero with headline + subline + CTA on left and abstract shape on right, trust logos bar below. Use proper typography scale, AIDA copy, and Framer Motion entrance animations.
